use_cases: Displaying image galleries with interactive 3D parallax depth effects on hover
Creating engaging product showcases with configurable perspective transforms
Building visually immersive media galleries with layered depth perception
Adding dynamic visual interest to hero sections or landing pages
ai_summary: A React component that renders images in a dark-themed grid layout with 3D parallax effects triggered on hover. Uses CSS custom properties (--f for depth factor and --r for border radius) to create configurable perspective transforms. Each image responds independently to mouse movement, creating a layered depth illusion. Ideal for media galleries, product showcases, or any context where interactive visual depth enhances user engagement.
